title: KONTROLA WETERYNARYJNA PERSONELU, OPRACOWANIE SPECJALNEJ LISTY KONTROLNEJ BEZPIECZEŃSTWA BIOLOGICZNEGO
description: A veterinary control procedure and specialized checklist have been developed under the NetPoulSafe project to support poultry producers in enforcing comprehensive biosecurity measures. The checklist comprises 47 scored questions, GPS-verified smartphone images, and certification levels linked to financial compensation to motivate and reward compliance.
